title.en: All of a sudden, the supreme beings of the huma...

content.en:
Ye Tian did not hide the matter of becoming a supreme, but notified the other supremes of the human race.

All of a sudden, the supreme beings of the human race were overjoyed.

At the same time, the Supremes were also very curious about how powerful Ye Tian's strength was.

Soon, one by one, the Supremes came to the Holy City.

And Ye Tian entertained the Supremes in the Heavenly Pavilion, and the entire human race also knew that the human race had given birth to a new supreme, and it was also the Ten Thousand Law Supreme whose reputation spread throughout the universe.

In the past, although Ye Tian's combat power had reached the Supreme, it was not easy to publicize, and no matter how strong the cultivation of the Domination level was, it could only be regarded as a Dominant, and only when he entered the Tianzun realm and reached the Supreme combat power could he be regarded as the Supreme.

Heavenly Pavilion.

Ye Tian and a group of supremes sat on the throne one after another, countless rare fruits were placed on the table next to the throne, and the supremes were chatting while eating and laughing.

Suddenly.

The Divine Blade Supreme opened his mouth and asked, "Ten Thousand Law Supreme, now that your cultivation has broken through, I don't know how many levels of strength you have reached?"

"I don't know!"

Ye Tian shook his head and said, "My strength has improved a lot, and I can't know how many supremes I have reached at present, but if it is compared to the first god lord of the god race, he is not my opponent!"

"What, the First Divine Lord of the Protoss is not your opponent of the Ten Thousand Laws Supreme?"

The Supremes were stunned.

What a terrifying supreme being the first god lord of the Protoss, that is a second-class supreme!

If it was when those supremes in the twelve universe epochs did not come, the first god lord of the Protoss would be the strongest supreme in the universe.

But now, Ye Tian had just stepped into the Heavenly Venerable Cultivation, and he said that his strength surpassed that of the First Divine Lord.

If it was someone else's words, they would definitely think that the other party was bragging, but this was said by Ye Tian, and they didn't know whether to believe it for a while.

"Wanfa Supreme, my strength is a third-class supreme, and my current doppelganger is a fourth-class extreme supreme, and it is also my most powerful doppelganger, this doppelganger can temporarily burst out with an attack comparable to a third-class supreme when he casts a secret technique, maybe he can test the strength of the Wanfa Supreme!"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

However, he didn't say a word, that is, the attack power of the third-rank supreme was too weak, and even when he was in the master realm, he was able to exert the attack power of the third-rank supreme, so the attack power of the clone of the Mixed Yuan Supreme was comparable to the Hunyuan Slash.

But now, he has stepped into the realm of Tianzun, and his strength is many times stronger, and the attack of this third-class supreme is like tickling to him.

But it's not good for him to say such things, otherwise wouldn't it be a blow to the Mixed Yuan Supreme and other supremes?

"Wanfa Supreme, this place is not strong, let's go to the edge of the universe and try it!"

Mixed Element Supreme proposed.

"Okay!" Ye Tian agreed, the Terran Territory was not far from the edge of the universe, and how fast these Supremes of them were, they could come to the edge of the universe in a while.

Moreover, the space at the edge of the universe is solid, which is perfect for the Supreme Trial move.

Woohoo!!

A Supreme Beings tore through the space and left, then shuttled through the void, and soon came to the edge of the universe.

......

Ye Tian stood in the void, while the clone of the Mixed Yuan Supreme stood in the distance.

"Mixed Yuan Supreme, attack!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"Be careful!"

Mixed Yuan Supreme condensed.

I saw that the Mixed Yuan Supreme took out an axe, which was a supreme treasure axe.

This doppelganger of the Mixed Yuan Supreme was actually cultivated with the Supreme Treasure, and it may also be an axe, so with this Supreme Supreme Treasure axe, the power has skyrocketed.

"Split the sky!"

The Mixed Yuan Supreme slashed with an axe, as if opening the heavens and the earth, and the void was instantly cut in half.

The terrifying axe light slashed everything, descended with terrifying power, and landed on Ye Tian's body.

However, Ye Tian didn't make the slightest move, just held up a simple defense.

"Ten Thousand Laws Supreme, hide!"

Kungo Supreme shouted.

This is a full-strength blow comparable to that of a third-class supreme, even a second-class supreme would not dare not make any resistance!

Simple defense is the same as no defense!

Rumble!!!!

The axe light bombarded Ye Tian's body, but it did not make Ye Tian take a step back, although it broke through Ye Tian's simple defense, it was destroyed by Ye Tian's powerful body.

"It's still too weak!"

Ye Tian sighed secretly.

His current defensive ability is too terrifying, I'm afraid that only the first-class supreme can be expected to hurt him, and the second-class supreme can't break through his real defense.

This is the horror of the half-step chaotic life body!

"Are you alright?"

The Mixed Yuan Supreme was shocked.

This is the effect of his full blow, although it is not the attack power of the main body, but it has also reached the level of third-rank supreme attack, but he didn't expect that even Ye Tian's defense could not be broken.

"I'm sorry, I can't test the strength of the Ten Thousand Law Supreme!"

The Mixed Yuan Supreme said helplessly.

Although his deity is stronger, he will not let the deity appear.

In fact, not many people have ever seen him in person.

This is his secret, it is impossible to let the deity appear just because he helped Ye Tian test his combat power!

"Wanfa Supreme, your physical body is too terrifying!"

Divine Blade Supreme was amazed.

Kunwu Supreme stood up and said, "Wanfa Supreme, your current strength is already the first of the human race, and you should be the first supreme of the human race!"

The Mixed Yuan Supreme didn't have any opinion on the words of the Kunwu Supreme, he used to be the first supreme of the human race, but now Ye Tian is stronger, so he naturally acts as the first supreme of the human race.

Ye Tian smiled and said, "Yes, then I will accept the title of the First Supreme of the Human Race." In addition, I propose that the Terrans should establish a supreme-level alliance so that the Terrans can develop faster. "

In the past, the Terran Supremes did not unite because the number of Supremes was too small, and each Supreme basically had power, plus there was no too powerful Supreme Leader.

Although the Mixed Yuan Supreme is powerful, it is the only third-class supreme of the human race, but the Mixed Yuan Supreme body does not appear, and the strongest clone is only comparable to the fourth-class extreme supreme.

There are several fourth-class supremes of the human race, so the mixed yuan supreme cannot completely dominate the human race.

And Ye Tian is different, he is at least a second-class supreme now, and one person is enough to easily suppress all the supremes of the entire human race.

He proposed to create an organization that united all the Supremes, and the other Supremes naturally did not dare to oppose it.

After some discussion, an organization called the Supreme Hall was established.

The Supreme Hall is above the nine supreme-level forces and the supreme hall of the human race, and the minimum is that the third-level or above Tianzun can join, and the Tianzun can only be regarded as a peripheral member, and the official group must have supreme combat power.

The purpose of the Supreme Hall is mainly to unite the Supreme, communicate together to improve the strength, and help more strong people become the Supreme.

And Ye Tian is the hall master of the Supreme Palace!

Soon, the news of the establishment of the Supreme Hall spread throughout the entire human race, and for a while, the reputation of the Supreme of Ten Thousand Laws resounded throughout the countless territories of the entire human race.
